hadith_entries.text:
984. Narrated Zayd ibn Khalid Al Johani ; "The Prophet
led us in Al Fajr Prayer at Al Hodaybiyyah after a rainy night.
On completion of the prayer, he faced the people and said: "Do
you know what your Lord has said (revealed)? The people
replied; 'Allah and His Messenger know best." He said: "Allah
has said: 'In this morning some of My servants remained as true
believers and some became disbelievers. Whoever said that the
rain was due to the blessings and the mercy of Allah is the one
who believes in Me and he disbelieves in the star, and whoever
said that it rained because of a particular star is a disbeliever in
Me and believer in the star." (Bukhari).
